programme.title: S1E2 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.

programme.title: Outlaws Paradise 1939
programme.desc: A notorious outlaw gang finds refuge in a remote desert hideout they call “paradise,” using it as a base for their criminal operations. When a determined lawman tracks them down, he goes undercover to infiltrate the group and bring them to justice. As tensions rise and loyalties are tested, a final showdown looms that will decide the fate of the outlaws and restore order to the frontier

programme.title: Code Of The Cactus
programme.desc: When Blackton outbids Bill Carson. Bill suspects he will have to rustle cattle to fulfill the contract. So Bill arrives posing as an Mexican. When he rustles the cattle from the rustlers, it gets him into the gang. Hoping to bring them all to justice, he is in trouble when his true identity is revealed.

programme.title: North of Arizona
programme.desc: Perrin is a cowboy who comes to the aid of local Indians being swindled out of their gold. He signs on as a ranch foreman, but learns the ranch is the home of the crooks.

programme.title: Water Rustlers 1938
programme.desc: In Water Rustlers, a young rancher’s daughter (Dorothy Page, the ‘Singing Cowgirl’) takes a courageous stand against a ruthless gang stealing the valley’s most precious resource—water. With songs, six-guns, and plenty of grit, she fights to protect her land and her people in this action-filled Western that blends melody with mayhem.

programme.title: The Cowboy and the Bandit 1935
programme.desc: In The Cowboy and the Bandit, Rex Lease saddles up for action in a fast-paced tale of loyalty, lawlessness, and frontier justice. When a notorious outlaw’s fate collides with that of an honest cowboy, the line between friend and foe blurs as danger closes in. Packed with hard-riding chases, six-gun showdowns, and plenty of Western grit, this classic delivers thrills where the open range meets the outlaw trail.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen: Is This a Pork Chop?
programme.desc: Chef Yesinia Melo of Jessy’s Clean Meals in Lawrence takes on Chef Jason Gentles of Sahel in Lowell in a spicy battle of the mill towns. Can Yesinia’s fresh cooking put the Jerk champion in his place? Or will Jason knock it out of the park?

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness: Singing for Reggie and Singing with Jimmy
programme.desc: Meet Reggie, a Greenville singer who lost his voice due to throat cancer. Justin and Ryan fulfill their promise by performing one of his songs to a theater filled with their fans. Later, Jimmy hits the streets to spread joy by serenading locals.

programme.title: America's Most Delish Midwest: 10 Unexpected Eats with Midwest Flair
programme.desc: Uncover the Midwest's unexpected. From quirky to inventive flavor mash-ups like the bulgogi burger to the questionable sour cream & raisin pie, see how the area crafts some interesting but delightful culinary concoctions.

programme.title: My Perfect Day with Woman's Day: Special Olympics Champ Boogies Through Bucketlist
programme.desc: Chris has an unstoppable spirit, despite the challenges of Down syndrome. His resilience has propelled him to extraordinary achievements, including clinching the gold in Greece. Meaghan takes him on a whirlwind of experiences tailored just for him.
